message:
fix(ui): prevent shell injection in editor file path

When opening the beads file in an editor with arguments (e.g., "code --wait"),
the file path was passed directly to a shell command with only double-quote
protection. This didn't prevent shell expansion of $, backticks, or other
metacharacters in maliciously-crafted file paths.

Fix: Use single quotes on Unix (which prevents all shell expansion except
for single quotes) and proper double-quote escaping on Windows.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
